claims.footer: Rewards will be sent to your in-game mail within 24 hours

notifications.testBody:
This is a test notification!

You would receive this notification when your daily sign-in reward is available.

Use `/daily` to check and claim your rewards.
notifications.sentBody: Check your DMs for the test notification!
notifications.failedBody: Failed to send test notification. Make sure your DMs are open.
